item.title: [Unsupervised Learning] Ep 85: Has AI Infra Stabilized, FM Vibe Shift, & What's Next for Coding Agents
item.description:
Speaker 1 | 00:00 - 00:03 Isn't that crazy? That number is just mind boggling.
Speaker 2 | 00:03 - 00:06 What is the state of the AI coding wars today?
Speaker 1 | 00:06 - 00:16 We're in a phase of sort of, like, capability exploration. The general thesis that I have been pursuing now is that the same way that 2025 was a year of coding agents, 2026 is coding agents breaking containment, do everything else.
Speaker 2 | 00:16 - 00:21 Do you worry about the foundation models just eating into a b...
